title: Oh Penne Lyrics Vanakkam Chennai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Oh Penne
Singers: Anirudh, Vishal Dadlani
Lyrics: Na. Muthukumar
Music: Anirudh Ravichander
Movie: Vanakkam Chennai (2013)		.


Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Un kaigal korthu, unnodu poga
en nenjam thaan yengudey
dhinam uyir vaangudhey
un Thozhil saayndhu kanmodi vazha
en ullam alaiaayudhey
ayyo thadumaarudhey

kannam meley, mazhai neerai poley
mutham kolam poda aasai
allaadudhey,
nee pesum pechu naalthorum ketu,
endham jenmam
theera yekkam thallaadudhey.

Oh penne penne en kanney kanney
unmai sonnaal enna
unnai thandhaal enna (2)

never wanna see ..
forget the thunder n lightening
hold you to see the morning light
never leave your faith

Yezhu kadjal thaandi unnakaaga
vandheney
Indha nadhi vandhu kadal
serudhey
en nilavai vetti modhirangal
seiveney
adhu unnai sera oli veesudhey

Andha vinmeengal thaan
undhan kanniniley
vandhu kudiyerave konjam
edamketkudhey
indha un kaiyile naan
nool bommaye
oonjal pol maarudhey
adi un penmaye

Oh penne penne en kanney kanney
unmai sonnaal enna
unnai thandhaal enna (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oh Penne'?

The song 'Oh Penne' expresses deep romantic feelings and longing, showcasing the beauty of love.

What is the plot context of 'Vanakkam Chennai'?

'Vanakkam Chennai' revolves around love and relationships, highlighting the journey of its characters in a vibrant city.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features vocals by Anirudh and Vishal Dadlani, with music composed by Anirudh himself.

When was 'Oh Penne' released?

'Oh Penne' was released on July 28, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Oh Penne', the characters in Vanakkam Chennai express their love and affection through vibrant melodies and heartfelt lyrics. The song encapsulates the joy and excitement of romance, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. With its upbeat tempo and engaging duet, it evokes feelings of happiness and togetherness. This track is a delightful addition to any romantic occasion, resonating with listeners who cherish love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Penne from Vanakkam Chennai is a vibrant duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With Anirudh's captivating composition and Vishal Dadlani's energetic vocals, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the melodious world of love and celebration with this unforgettable track!
stanzaMeanings: Your hands are tied, my heart is where you go, every day it takes life from me. Your work is done, my heart is restless, oh, don't let it be a burden.
Like rain falling on my eyes, I wish for kisses. Your words, when spoken, echo forever, they don't let my life be free from this fate.
Oh girl, girl, my dear, dear, what will happen if you tell the truth? What will happen if I give you?
never wanna see .. forget the thunder n lightening hold you to see the morning light never leave your faith
I crossed seven seas to come for you. This river flows to meet the ocean. I will break my state of being to unite with you, that will blow the sound of you.
Those stars are in your eyes, come and settle down a bit. In your hands, I am like a doll swinging, oh, that is your femininity.
Oh girl, girl, my dear, dear, what will happen if you tell the truth? What will happen if I give you?
Your hands are tied, my heart is where you go, every day it takes life from me. Your work is done, my heart is restless, oh, don't let it be a burden.
Like rain falling on my eyes, I wish for kisses. Your words, when spoken, echo forever, they don't let my life be free from this fate.
Oh girl, girl, my dear, dear, what will happen if you tell the truth? What will happen if I give you?
